##NETSTAT_HOME
EZZ2500I NETSTAT CS V2R5
HOME ADDRESS LIST:
  LINKNAME: ETH0LINK
    ADDRESS: 10.1.1.2
  LINKNAME: LOOPBACK
    ADDRESS: 127.0.0.1
##PROFILE
;;SOURCE_DSN=TCPIP.TCPPARMS(PROFILE1)
; sample PROFILE.TCPIP excerpt
HOSTNAME MVSTCPIP
DEVICE OSA2080 MPCIPA
LINK ETH0LINK IPAQENET OSA2080
HOME 10.1.1.2 ETH0LINK
